name: SemiLEDs Corp
business: SemiLEDs develops, manufactures and sells LED chips, LED components, LED modules and systems for specialty industrial applications including UV curing, medical/cosmetic, counterfeit detection, horticulture, architectural, and entertainment lighting. The company sells to distributors and customers concentrated in India, Japan, the Netherlands, and the United States.
sellsTo: customers in India, Japan, Netherlands, United States

exposures.sentence: We develop, manufacture and sell light emitting diode (LED) chips, LED components, LED modules and systems.

Our products are used for general specialty industrial applications, including ultraviolet, or UV, curing of polymers, LED light therapy in medical/cosmetic applications, counterfeit detection, LED lighting for horticulture applications, architectural lighting and entertainment lighting.
